requests.name: Confirm Offer
requests.notes: Landlord confirms the top bidder. Listing status changes from pending_landlord_confirmation to ended. Winner and loser notifications sent. Requires landlord auth.

requests.name: Decline and Relist
requests.notes: Landlord declines the top bidder. Listing resets to active with new 7-day auction end. Top bidder notified via email. Existing bids preserved. Requires landlord auth.
